series_metadata.series_description: Copy of program code, program flowcharts, program maint log, system change notices, original design documents, specifications, requirements, acceptance tests, and other records that document computer progams and the modifications made to computer programs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: all data in system has been mirgrated or destroyed. Reviewed by State Archives prior destruction. ; Electronic: all data in system has been mirgrated or destroyed. Reviewed by State Archives prior destruction
